_note: Archived stories S161-S207 from prd-v3.json. All passes:true as of 2026-04-26. Kept for reference only. Active stories start at S208 in prd-v3.json.

stories.title: Note collections: schema, API, and group_name migration
stories.summary: NoteCollectionModel + NoteCollectionMemberModel, GET/POST/DELETE /collections, 2-level nesting, group_name migration, GET /notes?collection_id filter.

stories.title: Hierarchical tags: shadow index table, canonical tag registry, prefix-search API
stories.summary: NoteTagIndexModel, CanonicalTagModel, TagAliasModel, _sync_tag_index, GET /tags/autocomplete prefix search, hierarchical GET /notes?tag= filter.

stories.title: Notes as Kuzu graph nodes: NOTE type, WRITTEN_ABOUT entity edges, TAG_IS_CONCEPT bridge
stories.summary: Kuzu Note node, WRITTEN_ABOUT/TAG_IS_CONCEPT/DERIVED_FROM edges, NoteGraphService (upsert/delete/get), GET /notes/{id}/entities, chat_graph enrichment.

stories.title: Collections UI: sidebar tree, CRUD dialog, multi-collection assignment
stories.summary: CollectionTree component, CreateCollectionDialog, NoteEditorDialog multi-collection checkboxes, drag-and-drop assignment, collection_ids in note response.

stories.title: Hierarchical tag browser UI: tree sidebar, tag management panel, TagAutocomplete
stories.summary: TagTree component, TagManagementPanel (rename/re-parent/merge), TagAutocomplete with hierarchy-aware dropdown, POST /tags/merge atomic endpoint.

stories.title: Semantic note clustering via HDBSCAN: auto-suggest collections
stories.summary: ClusteringService with sklearn HDBSCAN, ClusterSuggestionModel, POST /notes/cluster, GET /notes/cluster/suggestions, accept/reject endpoints, 'Auto-organize' sidebar button.

stories.title: Tag co-occurrence graph in Viz tab: Sigma.js tag network mode
stories.summary: TagGraphService (build_tag_graph with co-occurrence SQL), GET /tags/graph, TagGraph Sigma.js component in Viz tab, luminary:navigate on node click.

stories.title: Smart tag normalization: embedding similarity scan, merge suggestions drawer
stories.summary: TagMergeSuggestionModel, SmartTagNormalizerService (bge-m3 cosine similarity >0.85), POST /tags/normalization/scan, NormalizationDrawer accept/reject UI.

stories.title: Collection-based flashcard generation: deck naming, incremental generation
stories.summary: FlashcardModel.source_content_hash, FlashcardService.generate_from_collection (skips hash-matched notes), GET /flashcards/decks with source_type, 'By Collection' tab in GenerateFlashcardsDialog.

stories.title: Notes performance refactor: fix vector dimension mismatch (384->1024)
stories.summary: NOTE_VECTOR_DIM=1024 in vector_store.py, auto-drop-and-recreate on dim mismatch, ReindexService, POST /admin/notes/reindex, @pytest.mark.slow tag-query performance test.

stories.title: Note-to-note bidirectional links: Zettelkasten-style connections
stories.summary: NoteLinkModel, Kuzu LINKS_TO edge, POST/DELETE/GET /notes/{id}/links, [[ autocomplete trigger in NoteEditorDialog, backlinks section, [[id|text]] chip rendering.

stories.title: Note nodes in Viz Knowledge and Learning Path graph modes
stories.summary: GET /graph?include_notes=true returns Note nodes + WRITTEN_ABOUT/LINKS_TO edges, Viz 'Notes' layer toggle, square indigo Note nodes, NotePreviewPanel on click.

stories.title: Collection health report: cohesion score, orphaned notes, coverage gaps, stale notes
stories.summary: CollectionHealthService (cohesion score, orphaned/uncovered/stale notes), NoteModel.archived column, GET /collections/{id}/health, POST .../archive-stale, CollectionHealthPanel.

stories.title: Export: collections as Obsidian Markdown vault and as Anki deck
stories.summary: ExportService (export_collection_markdown->zip, export_collection_anki->.apkg via genanki), GET /collections/{id}/export?format=, browser download from CollectionTree actions menu.

stories.title: Multi-document notes: cross-book annotations with dual entity edge support
stories.summary: NoteSourceModel pivot (note_id+document_id), GET /notes?document_id= uses both model FK and pivot, DERIVED_FROM edges for each NoteSourceModel row, multi-select document picker in NoteEditorDialog.

stories.title: Notes reader-first layout: widen content area, strategic actions, clickable tag navigation
stories.summary: Full-width note reader panel/Sheet, floating action bar, clickable tag chips dispatch luminary:navigate, in-place edit mode, source doc subtitle link.

stories.title: Progress tab: replace Monitoring with learner-centric view, move dev metrics to /admin
stories.summary: Monitoring.tsx -> Progress.tsx, GoalsPanel moved from Study to Progress, RAG/Phoenix/Langfuse panels moved to /admin route, hidden 'Dev Tools' footer link.

stories.title: Study tab consolidation: merge health panels, Smart Generate button, fix default deck label
stories.summary: Single 'Smart Generate' button (mastery-adaptive mode), DeckHealthPanel+HealthReportPanel merged into 'Deck Status' accordion, 'default' deck label aliased to document title.

stories.title: Context-aware flashcard generation: best-practices for non-fiction and technical books
stories.summary: Pre-generation chunk classifier (concept/definition/example/analogy/narrative/transition), genre-aware prompt, FlashcardModel.chunk_classification, embedding-based dedup (>=0.85 cosine).

stories.title: Chat interface simplification: settings drawer, collapsible transparency panel
stories.summary: ChatSettingsDrawer (gear icon) for model/web toggle, 'How I answered' collapsed to 'i' icon by default, low-confidence shown as compact inline badge not full-width banner.

stories.title: Viz tab overhaul: collapsible View Options panel, select-all entity types, hide Call Graph
stories.summary: Call Graph hidden unless code document selected, layer toggles in collapsible View Options panel, Select All/Deselect All entity type controls, cluster view when >200 nodes.

stories.title: YouTube transcript viewer: full feature parity with text documents in Read section
stories.summary: Transcript displayed as chunked paragraphs with timestamps, video metadata header, DocumentModel.youtube_url/channel_name fields, fallback 'processing' state with 10s polling.

stories.title: Learning tab: slim LibraryOverview into sidebar widget, document list as primary focus
stories.summary: LibraryOverview as single-row stats bar (4-5 clickable pills), document list as primary content, 'Continue reading' highlighted top row, empty library CTA.

stories.title: Flashcard search and unified browse replaces deck-first navigation
stories.summary: GET /flashcards/search with FTS5 virtual table, filter chips (document/collection/tag/bloom/fsrs_state/type), paginated card grid replaces deck list.

stories.title: Simplified Study tab: single generate button with adaptive defaults
stories.summary: Single 'Generate Cards' button (SmartGenerate logic), disclosure chevron for power-user options, DeckHealthPanel+HealthReportPanel+StrugglingPanel merged into 'Insights' accordion.

stories.title: Chat: inline document scope selector replaces settings drawer scope
stories.summary: Combobox in Chat header for document scope, scope removed from ChatSettingsDrawer, document change inserts scope-change divider (no conversation clear), chatPreload preserved.

stories.title: Chat: document-aware contextual recommendations
stories.summary: GET /chat/suggestions?document_id= returns 4 doc-type-specific suggestions using Kuzu entities/sections (no LLM), ConfusionSignals removed, SuggestionPills replaces all old components.

stories.title: Flashcard generation: context-rich questions with source grounding
stories.summary: Section heading + chapter context injected into prompt, Kuzu entity names for books, code blocks for technical docs, Bloom L3+ targeting >=50%, FlashcardResponse.section_heading field.

stories.title: Auto-organize: guided plan with confirmation workflow
stories.summary: OrganizationPlanDialog shows all clusters at once with editable names, drag notes between groups, POST /notes/cluster/suggestions/batch-accept (single transaction), Dismiss rejects all.

stories.title: Tag search: type-ahead search in Notes sidebar
stories.summary: Search input at top of TagTree, client-side filter with parent chain context, matching substring highlighted, Enter applies tag filter, clear restores full tree. Frontend-only.

stories.title: Library document action menu: quick navigation to document-scoped tabs
stories.summary: Three-dot DropdownMenu on DocumentCard: Read/Chat about this/Study flashcards/View notes/View in graph. Each dispatches luminary:navigate with tab + document scope. No new endpoints.

stories.title: DocumentReader notes panel: collection-scoped active reading sidebar
stories.summary: NoteCollectionModel.auto_document_id column, GET /collections/by-document/{id}, POST /collections/auto/{id} (idempotent), Notes tab replaces One-liner in DocumentReader right panel, NotesReaderPanel component.

stories.title: Glossary: persistent storage, categorization, and regeneration
stories.summary: GlossaryTermModel (id/document_id/term/definition/first_mention_section_id/category), GET /explain/glossary/{id}/cached, upsert on regenerate, DELETE /explain/glossary/{id}/terms/{term_id}, searchable table with category badges.

stories.title: References: URL validation and pruning of dead links
stories.summary: WebReferenceModel.is_valid + last_checked_at, ReferenceValidatorService (httpx HEAD, Semaphore(5), max 20), POST /references/documents/{id}/validate, GET /references excludes invalid by default, 3-tier UI (verified/unchecked/unavailable).

stories.title: Chat: Bloom-progressive recommendations with dedup and summary grounding
stories.summary: ChatSuggestionHistoryModel, LLM-powered GET /chat/suggestions using executive summary + entities, Bloom level decays from 5 to 2 over 4 asked questions, Jaccard dedup, POST /chat/suggestions/{id}/asked.

stories.title: Chat: non-destructive scope clear preserves conversation context
stories.summary: X button on scope selector inserts scope-change divider instead of clearing conversation. Trash icon remains the only explicit clear. Frontend-only change to Chat.tsx.

stories.title: Compare notes with book: auto-collection gap analysis
stories.summary: notes_gap_node auto-fetches from document auto-collection when no explicit note_ids, 'Compare my notes' button in DocumentReader toolbar, GapDetectDialog Quick-compare mode, 'Take a note on this' per gap result.

stories.title: Highlight reliability: text viewer, PDF edge cases, large selection menu
stories.summary: SelectionActionBar viewport clamping, ReadView data-section-id DOM walk fix, PDF fallback section matching for page_start=0, 10000-char selection limit disables highlight swatches.

stories.title: Naming conventions: UPPER-CASE collections and lower-case tags with dash separators
stories.summary: normalize_collection_name and normalize_tag_slug in naming.py, applied at POST /collections + POST /tags + _sync_tag_index, POST /tags/migrate-naming + POST /collections/migrate-naming, tagUtils.ts equivalents, frontend preview in TagAutocomplete + CreateCollectionDialog.

stories.title: PDF Viewer: working internal links, external links, and rendering fidelity
stories.summary: GoTo action dict support in linkService.navigateTo, external links as anchors with target=_blank, --scale-factor sync with canvas re-render, highlight marks don't block link clicks.

stories.title: Fix tag auto-save on note creation and eliminate duplicate notes
stories.summary: Accepted auto-tags persisted via PUT /notes/{id}, suggest-tags returns normalized slugs, backend dedup (same doc/section/hash within 5s), save button debounce guard, batch_accept_suggestions applies normalize_collection_name.

stories.title: Fix CI gate errors and browser console errors
stories.summary: CI sweep: ruff check + pytest + tsc --noEmit all exit 0. Browser console check across all 6 tabs. Suspense fallbacks verified on lazy pages. No new 'any' type assertions.

stories.title: PDF Viewer: in-page and cross-page text search
stories.summary: PdfSearchBar overlay (Ctrl+F), in-page match highlights + prev/next, cross-page match index via getTextContent(), lazy page extraction, cached page text Map, Escape to close.

stories.title: Notes created from highlighted text sync state across all surfaces
stories.summary: POST /notes response includes full NoteModel. After highlight-based note creation: invalidate ['notes'], ['notes', documentId], ['document-notes', documentId], ['collections'] TanStack Query keys.

stories.title: PDF text layer and search highlight rendering: fix font overlap and visual artifacts
stories.summary: Highlights rendered as absolutely-positioned overlay divs between canvas and text layer (no <mark> injection into spans). applyPdfHighlights + applySearchHighlights refactored. Text selection and AnnotationPopover preserved.

stories.title: Fix flashcard search: FTS5 query returns no results for keyword searches
stories.summary: flashcards_fts populated on create/generate, backfill on startup (INSERT OR IGNORE), UPDATE/DELETE triggers, query sanitized/quoted, LIKE fallback on 0 results, 'No flashcards found' empty state.

stories.title: Auto-organize: retroactive naming normalization and actionable suggestions
stories.summary: ClusteringService.detect_naming_violations(), POST /notes/cluster/normalize-check, POST /notes/cluster/normalize-apply (transactional), startup migration normalizes existing tags+collections, OrganizationPlanDialog shows 'Naming Fixes' section even when no cluster suggestions.
